name: Stenvar
description:
Stenvar was my first husband in Skyrim all those years ago, this is my homage to him. 🥰


He's a gruff, battle-hardened mercenary with a bit of dry humor, what's not to love?


(I shamelessly stole the image here : https://www.flickr.com/photos/118013793@N02/12642872803)
creator: SBD91
